'''âf-r-p''' ('''kafarap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:netorare|netorare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:netorare|netorare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kafarap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifarap|thifarap]] || [[word:jifarap|jifarap]] || [[word:shifarap|shifarap]] || [[word:kifarap|kifarap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufarap|thuthufarap]] || [[word:jujufarap|jujufarap]] || [[word:shushufarap|shushufarap]] || [[word:kukufarap|kukufarap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufarap|thufarap]] || [[word:jufarap|jufarap]] || [[word:shufarap|shufarap]] || [[word:kufarap|kufarap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufarap|thufarap]] || [[word:jufarap|jufarap]] || [[word:shufarap|shufarap]] || [[word:kufarap|kufarap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefarap|thefarap]] || [[word:jefarap|jefarap]] || [[word:shefarap|shefarap]] || [[word:kefarap|kefarap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofarap|thothofarap]] || [[word:jojofarap|jojofarap]] || [[word:shoshofarap|shoshofarap]] || [[word:kokofarap|kokofarap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofarap|thofarap]] || [[word:jofarap|jofarap]] || [[word:shofarap|shofarap]] || [[word:kofarap|kofarap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofarap|thofarap]] || [[word:jofarap|jofarap]] || [[word:shofarap|shofarap]] || [[word:kofarap|kofarap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfarap|thĂŠfarap]] || [[word:jĂŠfarap|jĂŠfarap]] || [[word:shĂŠfarap|shĂŠfarap]] || [[word:kĂŠfarap|kĂŠfarap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafarap|thathafarap]] || [[word:jajafarap|jajafarap]] || [[word:shashafarap|shashafarap]] || [[word:kakafarap|kakafarap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafarap|thafarap]] || [[word:jafarap|jafarap]] || [[word:shafarap|shafarap]] || [[word:kafarap|kafarap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafarap|thafarap]] || [[word:jafarap|jafarap]] || [[word:shafarap|shafarap]] || [[word:kafarap|kafarap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafarap|shafarap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafarap|goshafarap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafarap|gokishafarap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafarapnĂŒ|shafarapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafarapnknĂŒ|goshafarapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarapnĂŒ|gokishafarapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafarapshĂ«|shafarapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafarapnkshĂ«|goshafarapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafarapshĂ«|gokishafarapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarapro|shafarapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarapnkro|goshafarapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarapro|gokishafarapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarapmu|shafarapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarapnkmu|goshafarapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarapmu|gokishafarapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafarapsher|shafarapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafarapnksher|goshafarapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafarapsher|gokishafarapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafarapng|shafarapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafarapnkng|goshafarapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafarapng|gokishafarapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafarapya|shafarapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafarapnkya|goshafarapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafarapya|gokishafarapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafarapyam|shafarapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafarapnkyam|goshafarapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafarapyam|gokishafarapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafarapnĂŒshĂ«|shafarapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafarapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafarapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafarapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarapnĂŒro|shafarapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarapnknĂŒro|goshafarapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarapnĂŒro|gokishafarapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarapnĂŒmu|shafarapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarapnknĂŒmu|goshafarapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarapnĂŒmu|gokishafarapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafarapshĂ«nĂŒ|shafarapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafarapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafarapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarapshĂ«ro|shafarapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarapnkshĂ«ro|goshafarapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarapshĂ«ro|gokishafarapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarapshĂ«mu|shafarapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarapnkshĂ«mu|goshafarapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarapshĂ«mu|gokishafarapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafarapronĂŒ|shafarapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarapnkronĂŒ|goshafarapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarapronĂŒ|gokishafarapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafaraproshĂ«|shafaraproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarapnkroshĂ«|goshafarapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafaraproshĂ«|gokishafaraproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarapromu|shafarapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarapnkromu|goshafarapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarapromu|gokishafarapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafarapmunĂŒ|shafarapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarapnkmunĂŒ|goshafarapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarapmunĂŒ|gokishafarapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafarapmushĂ«|shafarapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarapnkmushĂ«|goshafarapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafarapmushĂ«|gokishafarapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarapmuro|shafarapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarapnkmuro|goshafarapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarapmuro|gokishafarapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
